reviews.review_description: i miss you

I haven’t played this game in forever since the servers went down but from what I remember it was a great game and fun to play with friends and the community was great I would always meet a good person on the game every day
Ok, now this is a good old game, I remember getting out of school and hopping on my vr head set to play penguin rush with my friends. I wish the servers would come back up.
Bad
I’m banned and I don’t understand what happened or what to do!

developer_response.body: You probably put in a false report or did something but if your still banned you can go into the game and do ban appeal.

reviews.review_description:
The discord isn’t working and I really want to become a moderator so I can fly please fix it

￼

developer_response.body: Maybe you entered it in to chrome, safari, or any search engine wrong, make sure you have a discord account and the link is https://discord.gg/penguinrush

reviews.review_description: My friend was on my phone and texted you hateful messages so sorry tell lemming become monke
Okay
can you please make me a Admin and my name in Discord is alex2jz

developer_response.body: Sorry but we don’t just give out admin, you would have to join the discord and be a mad the if your trusted enough, you will become admin

reviews.review_description: I started playing this game yesterday and I loved it, there’s the backrooms, a pool, it was SOOO fun, but randomly when I’m running around my game just crashes. I don’t know why, if it is possible to fix please do it. But overall it’s one of my favorite games.

developer_response.body: If your game crashed in the back rooms it is likely because an ai crashed your game, or a dev or admin kicked you, we have reduced the amount of kicks that will be done.

reviews.review_description: So first you can't see yourself in the mirror so please fix that. You can't see you're hands while playing. And the color system doesn't work. Also the ice isn't slippery.

developer_response.body: You have to be in a server for this to work, you cant see yourself because your not connected probably due to your wifi or general server issues. and everything works just fine. Also the ice is only slippery with your body and not your hands.

reviews.review_description:
This game is fun but you go to the back rooms and you cannot leave pls fix it pls 
￼

developer_response.body: You Need To Find A Way Out, Trust Me There Is, Just Find It.

reviews.review_description: I can't believe that you added the backrooms

developer_response.body: Yes we did lol and I am happy that you are happy

reviews.review_description: This  game is exactly what I wanted it has gorilla tag moment with parkour there is one glitch thought I cannot see my hands when I play but other than that this is a very good game and I would love to see multiplayer races and more maps

developer_response.body: You have to be connected in a server to view your hands, thank you for the positive review though!

reviews.review_description: Good the hit boxes are a bit weird But other then that thats it

developer_response.body: Please Join The Discord An Tell Us What Problem Your Having.

reviews.review_description: Penguin nice

Your game is fun but can you add the backrooms back it's just a Question I love your game I hope you bring the backrooms back just please add it back I was to late to see it I got this game 2 days ago please add it back
And your the best

developer_response.body: the backrooms will be in the next update

reviews.review_description: I play this game more than gtag it's really cool to become a penguin in vr 😎
its really fun but i can’t get out of The backrooms 🐧

developer_response.body: There Is A Way, You Just Have To Find It.

reviews.review_description: As the creator of this game I might be a bit biased but me and my team put a lot of hard work and dedication into this game and I hope you enjoy it!
